'''layaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yakhontovite|yakhontovite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yakhontovite|yakhontovite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| layaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læyækæth|læyækæth]] || [[word:læyækæj|læyækæj]] || [[word:læyækæsh|læyækæsh]] || [[word:læyækæ|læyækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:layayakath|layayakath]] || [[word:layayakaj|layayakaj]] || [[word:layayakash|layayakash]] || [[word:layayaka|layayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:layakath|layakath]] || [[word:layakaj|layakaj]] || [[word:layakash|layakash]] || [[word:layaka|layaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:layafkath|layafkath]] || [[word:layafkaj|layafkaj]] || [[word:layafkash|layafkash]] || [[word:layafkaf|layafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:layakatha|layakatha]] || [[word:layakaja|layakaja]] || [[word:layakasha|layakasha]] || [[word:layakaka|layakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:layakath|layakath]] || [[word:layakaj|layakaj]] || [[word:layakash|layakash]] || [[word:layaka|layaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:layakathal|layakathal]] || [[word:layakajal|layakajal]] || [[word:layakashal|layakashal]] || [[word:layakakal|layakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:layakathatha|layakathatha]] || [[word:layakajaja|layakajaja]] || [[word:layakashasha|layakashasha]] || [[word:layakaka|layakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:layakathan|layakathan]] || [[word:layakajan|layakajan]] || [[word:layakashan|layakashan]] || [[word:layakakan|layakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:layakathaoro|layakathaoro]] || [[word:layakajaoro|layakajaoro]] || [[word:layakashaoro|layakashaoro]] || [[word:layakakaoro|layakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
